description: Rust may remain after the Electron migration only as a documented non-Tauri helper. Legacy src-tauri code is tracked here as a release blocker, not as an approved exception.

transitionalLegacyRustBlockers.reason: Existing legacy Tauri runtime while workers port capabilities to Electron. This is not an approved Rust helper path.
transitionalLegacyRustBlockers.requiredResolution: Remove or replace before final no-Tauri scan/release, or extract only an approved non-Tauri helper into one of allowedHelperRoots with a completed exception entry.
